headline: This is Why Kimberly-Clark Corp (KMB) is a Top Dividend Stock to Invest in According to Jim Simons’ Renaissance Technologies
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corp (NASDAQ:KMB) is one of the best dividend stocks to invest in, according to Jim Simons’ Renaissance Technologies. On July 1, Arbex, the joint venture formed by Kimberly-Clark Corp (NASDAQ:KMB) and Suzano, started operating as an independent company. The $3.4 billion joint venture is positioned to pursue opportunities as an international tissue and hygiene […]
